word: H4693 - מָצֹור - mâtsôwr - maw-tsore' - Besieged places

sections.paragraph:
Original: מצור

Transliteration: mâtsôr

Phonetic: maw-tsore'

BDB Definition:

  1. " Matsor" , a name for Egypt
  2. (TWOT) siege, entrenchment

Origin: the same as H4692 in the sense of a limit

TWOT entry: 1898a

Part(s) of speech: Proper Name Location
